commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed to enforce the external-PR proof gate and choose between this active branch and the overlapping proof-supplied implementation.; Cleared: The diff only changes iMessage TypeScript send logic and tests; I found no concrete supply-chain, secrets, workflow, dependency, or credential-handling regression. (sha=ab93a4c2a7cb709ff9f6f2fb2c73c9ddab4c9dc2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the iMessage send path to use `send-attachment` for direct-handle media sends, split captioned media into attachment plus follow-up text, and adds focused send-path regression tests.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +102. Total +143 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the underlying bug by source inspection: current main only attempts `send-attachment` for media-only explicit chat targets, while direct handles and captioned media can still fall through to RPC `send` with `file`. I did not run a live Mac/iMessage bridge reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed to enforce the external-PR proof gate and choose between this active branch and the overlapping proof-supplied implementation.

target.title: fix: route iMessage DM media through attachment handoff
target.body:
## Summary
- route direct-handle iMessage media sends through `send-attachment` instead of the legacy RPC `send` + `file` path
- send captioned media as an attachment handoff followed by a normal text message
- add regression coverage for direct-handle media-only, direct-handle captioned media, and explicit-chat captioned media

## Test Plan
- [x] `pnpm vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts -t "routes DM handle media-only sends through send-attachment|sends DM handle media captions as attachment plus follow-up text|sends explicit chat media captions as attachment plus follow-up text"`
- [x] `pnpm vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts`
- [x] `pnpm test:extension imessage`

## Notes
- AI-assisted: yes
- This PR is intentionally scoped to the iMessage media handoff fix only.
- Latest `upstream/main` has been merged into this branch to keep it current with `main`.
- External PR real-behavior proof is still pending; local unit/extension test output does not satisfy that gate by itself.

Closes #87597
target.author: hoyalim

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
